G4270.strongs_def: to write previously; figuratively, to announce, prescribe
G4270.kjv_def: before ordain, evidently set forth, write (afore, aforetime)

G4237.derivation: perhaps from (a leek, and so an onion-patch);
G4237.strongs_def: a garden plot, i.e. (by implication, of regular beds) a row (repeated in plural by Hebraism, to indicate an arrangement)

G4209.strongs_def: the "purple" mussel, i.e. (by implication) the red-blue color itself, and finally a garment dyed with it

G4249.derivation: a strengthened form of a primary prio (to saw);

G4285.strongs_def: to lead the way for others, i.e. show deference

G4259.derivation: neuter of a presumed compound of G4253 (πρό) and G833 (αὐλή);

G4273.derivation: from G4272 (προδίδωμι) (in the sense of giving forward into another's (the enemy's) hands);

G4284.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2192 (ἔχω);
G4284.strongs_def: to hold oneself before others, i.e. (figuratively) to excel

G4281.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate);
G4281.strongs_def: to go onward, precede (in place or time)
G4281.kjv_def: go before (farther, forward), outgo, pass on

G4205.strongs_def: akin to the base of G4097 (πιπράσκω)); a (male) prostitute (as venal), i.e. (by analogy) a debauchee (libertine)

G4238.strongs_def: to "practise", i.e. perform repeatedly or habitually (thus differing from G4160 (ποιέω), which properly refers to a single act); by implication, to execute, accomplish, etc.; specially, to collect (dues), fare (personally)
G4238.kjv_def: commit, deeds, do, exact, keep, require, use arts
G4238.usage: do(28x), commit(5x), exact(1x), require(1x), deed(1x), keep(1x)

G4289.strongs_def: forward in spirit, i.e. predisposed; neuter (as noun) alacrity

G4262.strongs_def: relating to sheep, i.e. (a gate) through which they were led into Jerusalem

G4292.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2564 (καλέω);
G4292.strongs_def: to call forth to oneself (challenge), i.e. (by implication) to irritate

G4244.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4245 (πρεσβύτερος);
G4244.strongs_def: the order of elders, i.e. (specially), Israelite Sanhedrin or Christian "presbytery"

G4207.derivation: from G4206 (πόῤῥω) with adverbial enclitic of source;
G4207.strongs_def: from far, or (by implication) at a distance, i.e. distantly

G4252.strongs_def: Priscilla (i.e. little Prisca), a Christian woman

G4283.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2097 (εὐαγγελίζω);
G4283.strongs_def: to announce glad news in advance

G4260.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G939 (βάσις);
G4260.strongs_def: to walk forward, i.e. advance (literally, or in years)
G4260.kjv_def: + be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken

G4200.derivation: from a derivative of (a way, i.e. means);

G4220.derivation: neuter of a comparative of the base of G4226 (ποῦ);
G4220.strongs_def: interrogative as adverb, which (of two), i.e. is it this or that

G4263.derivation: probably neuter of a presumed derivative of G4260 (προβαίνω);
G4263.strongs_def: something that walks forward (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively)

G4272.strongs_def: to give before the other party has given

G4280.strongs_def: used as alternate of G4277 (προέπω); to say already, predict

G4265.strongs_def: to look out beforehand, i.e. furnish in advance

G4293.strongs_def: to anounce beforehand, i.e. predict, promise

G4211.derivation: feminine of a compound of G4209 (πορφύρα) and G4453 (πωλέω);
G4211.strongs_def: a female trader in purple cloth

G4213.strongs_def: a drinking (the act), i.e. (concretely) a draught

G4203.strongs_def: to act the harlot, i.e. (literally) indulge unlawful lust (of either sex), or (figuratively) practise idolatry

G4261.strongs_def: to throw forward, i.e. push to the front, germinate

G4242.strongs_def: seniority (eldership), i.e. (by implication) an embassy (concretely, ambassadors)

G4243.strongs_def: to be a senior, i.e. (by implication) act as a representative (figuratively, preacher)

G4223.strongs_def: little wells, i.e. mineral springs; Potioli (i.e. Puteoli), a place in Italy

G4221.derivation: neuter of a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω);
G4221.strongs_def: a drinking-vessel; by extension, the contents thereof, i.e. a cupful (draught); figuratively, a lot or fate

G4288.kjv_def: forwardness of mind, readiness (of mind), ready (willing) mind

G4276.strongs_def: to hope in advance of other confirmation

G4245.strongs_def: older; as noun, a senior; specially, an Israelite Sanhedrist (also figuratively, member of the celestial council) or Christian "presbyter"

G4266.strongs_def: to be already, i.e. have previousy transpired

G4256.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G156 (αἰτία);
G4256.strongs_def: to accuse already, i.e. previously charge

G4226.derivation: genitive case of an interrogative pronoun (what) otherwise obsolete (perhaps the same as G4225 (πού) used with the rising slide of inquiry);
G4226.strongs_def: as adverb of place; at (by implication, to) what locality

G4215.derivation: probably from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω) (compare G4224 (πότος));
G4215.strongs_def: a current, brook or freshet (as drinkable), i.e. running water

G4214.derivation: from an absolute (who, what) and G3739 (ὅς);
G4214.strongs_def: interrogative pronoun (of amount) how much (large, long or (plural) many)

G4279.derivation: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G1861 (ἐπαγγέλλω);

G4235.derivation: a form of G4239 (πραΰς), used in certain parts;

G4233.strongs_def: a practiser, i.e. (specially), an official collector

G4216.derivation: from G4215 (ποταμός) and a derivative of G5409 (φορέω);
G4216.strongs_def: river-borne, i.e. overwhelmed by a stream

G4225.derivation: genitive case of an indefinite pronoun (some) otherwise obsolete (compare G4214 (πόσος));
G4225.strongs_def: as adverb of place, somewhere, i.e. nearly

G4255.strongs_def: to choose for oneself before another thing (prefer), i.e. (by implication) to propose (intend)

G4264.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and a reduplicated form of G971 (βιάζω);
G4264.strongs_def: to force forward, i.e. bring to the front, instigate

G4217.derivation: apparently from G4219 (πότε) and the base of G4226 (ποῦ);
G4217.strongs_def: interrogatively, whatever, i.e. of what possible sort

G4282.strongs_def: to fit up in advance (literally or figuratively)

G4241.strongs_def: to tower up (be conspicuous), i.e. (by implication) to be suitable or proper (third person singular present indicative, often used impersonally, it is fit or right)

G4234.strongs_def: practice, i.e. (concretely) an act; by extension, a function

G4202.strongs_def: harlotry (including adultery and incest); figuratively, idolatry

G4219.derivation: from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G5037 (τέ);

G4251.strongs_def: feminine of Priscus, ancient; Priska, a Christian woman

G4295.strongs_def: to lie before the view, i.e. (figuratively) to be present (to the mind), to stand forth (as an example or reward)

G4274.strongs_def: a runner ahead, i.e. scout (figuratively, precursor)

G4254.strongs_def: to lead forward (magisterially); intransitively, to precede (in place or time (participle, previous))

G4298.strongs_def: to drive forward (as if by beating), i.e. (figuratively and intransitively) to advance (in amount, to grow; in time, to be well along)
G4298.kjv_def: increase, proceed, profit, be far spent, wax

G4299.derivation: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G2919 (κρίνω);

G4253.strongs_def: "fore", i.e. in front of, prior (figuratively, superior) to

G4231.strongs_def: to busy oneself with, i.e. to trade

G4229.strongs_def: a deed; by implication, an affair; by extension, an object (material)

G4222.derivation: from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω);

G4286.strongs_def: a setting forth, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention); specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God

G4287.derivation: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);
G4287.strongs_def: fixed beforehand, i.e. (feminine with G2250 (ἡμέρα) implied) a designated day

G4291.strongs_def: to stand before, i.e. (in rank) to preside, or (by implication) to practise

G4218.derivation: from the base of G4225 (πού) and G5037 (τέ);
G4218.strongs_def: indefinite adverb, at some time, ever
G4218.kjv_def: afore-(any, some-)time(-s), at length (the last), (+ n- )ever, in the old time, in time past, once, when

G4232.strongs_def: the prætorium or governor's courtroom (sometimes including the whole edifice and camp)

G4271.strongs_def: plain before all men, i.e. obvious
